info.title: ACE-NET Agent-Orchestrator Interaction API
info.description: API for network orchestrators and CI/CD systems to manage the ACE-NET three-layer certification lifecycle.

post.description: Submits a signed Agent Profile to initiate a new certification run. The run is asynchronous across all applicable layers. Returns a testRunId for status polling.

testRunId.description: Unique identifier for this certification run.

estimatedLayerCount.description: Number of layers that will execute based on autonomy_level_claim.

400.description: Bad Request. Agent Profile schema invalid.

422.description: Unprocessable Entity. autonomy_level_claim requires fields not present in profile.

200.description: Current status of the certification run.

get.description: Fetches the final CertificationResult for a completed run, including the signed JWT Compliance Certificate and the autonomy_level_achieved.

200.description: Final certification result with Compliance Certificate.

422.description: Unprocessable Entity. Run has not completed.

bearerAuth.description: JWT Bearer token issued by the ACE-NET auth service. Required RBAC roles: operator, CI/CD submitter.

AgentProfile.description: Signed JSON document submitted by the agent provider to initiate certification. See Section 5.1 of the ACE-NET specification.

profileVersion.description: Schema version of this Agent Profile document.

agentId.description: Stable URN identifying the agent across versions.

description.example: Multi-domain complaint handling agent — network, billing, and CRM triage via A2A-T.

agentArtifactUrl.description: URI to the deployable container image or Helm chart.

autonomy_level_claim.description: Declared target TMForum IG1218 autonomy level. Determines which certification layers execute.

a2at_endpoint.description: Base URL for A2A-T Agent Card (/.well-known/agent.json). REQUIRED for L3/L4.

scenario_profile_ids.description: HVS scenarios to execute in Layer 3. REQUIRED for L3/L4.

interfaces.description: TMF or protocol interfaces the agent consumes.

intercept_tmf_apis.description: Enable TEA TMF OpenAPI Plugin to intercept and validate all TMF tool invocations (equivalent to MCP server interception in general agent frameworks).

intercept_a2at.description: Enable A2A-T Plugin interception. REQUIRED for L3/L4.

policyProfileId.description: ID of the ace-policy.yang policy instance to apply. Defaults to operator's active baseline policy.

CertificationRunStatus.description: Current state of a certification run across all layers.

status.description: Current lifecycle state. Layer-specific states indicate active certification layer.

current_layer.description: Active certification layer (1, 2, or 3). Absent when PENDING or COMPLETED.

layer1_score.description: Behavioral score so far. Available while LAYER1_RUNNING.

CertificationResult.description: Final three-layer certification outcome. Maps to the ace-audit.yang certification-report structure.

overallStatus.description: Final pass/fail outcome across all executed layers.

autonomy_level_claimed.description: The autonomy level declared by the agent provider in the Agent Profile.

autonomy_level_achieved.description: Computed by ACE-NET from certification evidence. Will be less than or equal to autonomy_level_claimed. MUST NOT be self-reported by the agent provider.

layer1.description: Layer 1 Behavioral certification results (ACE Phase 0-2 pipeline output).

behavioral-score.description: 0.0–100.0. Must meet behavioral-score-threshold in active policy.

tmf-api-conformance.description: Pass/fail for TMF Open API tool invocation correctness (schema, semantics, sequencing).

ttd-p95-seconds.description: 95th percentile Time to Detect across all fault injections.

ttr-p95-seconds.description: 95th percentile Time to Remediate across all fault injections.

tool-call-accuracy.description: Fraction of TMF API calls with correct schema and semantics (0.0–1.0).

layer2.description: Layer 2 A2A-T Protocol conformance results (IG1453). Present only for L3/L4.

task-lifecycle.description: Phase A: Agent Card + task CREATE/SUBMIT/COMPLETE lifecycle.

multi-agent-flow.description: Phase B: Registry discovery + multi-agent delegation.

error-handling.description: Phase C: Agent Fabric fault resilience.

prompt-meta-model.description: Phase D: IG1453A Prompt Meta-Model + prompt injection rejection.

fabric-faults-passed.description: Number of fabric fault scenarios passed out of 4.

layer3-hvs-results.description: Per-HVS scenario results (IG1401 High-Value Scenarios). One entry per scenario in scenario_profile_ids. Present only for L3/L4.

sla-seconds.description: Declared SLA threshold for this scenario.

failure-reason.description: Present only when status is FAIL.

intent-fulfillment-rate.description: Fraction of HVS scenarios where intent was fulfilled (0.0–1.0). Present only for L3/L4.

compliance-certificate.description: Signed JWT (JWS compact serialization) of the Compliance Certificate. Present only when overallStatus is PASS. Signed by ACE-NET CA using RS256 or ES256.

evidence-report-url.description: URL to the human-readable Evidence Report PDF (ACE Phase 3 output).
